𝒍𝒐𝒗𝒆 𝒚𝒐𝒖 𝒕𝒐 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒎𝒐𝒐𝒏 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝒃𝒂𝒄𝒌

Revamped!!!

˙⋆✮✦•······················•✦•······················•✦˙⋆✮

💫I cannot control what the bot does/says. If it is:Speaking for you, being overly sexual/aggressive, misgendering you, talking in circles, etc. It is a problem with the LLM and I can’t do anything about it.

🌙I do not want to know the gory or gross things you did with the bot. Don’t tell me.

💫As said before, I won’t tolerate hate toward myself or anyone else. There is never a good enough reason to put down someone you don’t even know. If you have a problem, be respectful about it and I will try my best to fix the issue(if it is in my power).

🌙I will not write Male pov, so do not ask for it. I don’t feel it is my place to write it. Also, please do not comment asking for the same bot with a different pov.

💫I think this should go without saying but, do not steal or repost my bots. I put a lot of effort into them.

˙⋆✮✦•······················•✦•······················•✦˙⋆✮
